message:
docs: Expand features 43-51 with comprehensive specifications

Complete the full expansion of all 51 features in NEW_IDEAS_FOR_PHAGE_EXPLORER.md:

Features 43-51 now include:
- HGT Provenance Tracer (MinHash donor inference)
- Module Coherence & Stoichiometry Checker (RBS strength)
- Amino-Acid Property Phase Portraits (PCA trajectories)
- Structure-Informed Capsid/Tail Constraint Scanner
- CRISPR Pressure & Anti-CRISPR Landscape
- Dinucleotide & Codon Bias Tensor Decomposition (NMF)
- Functional Synteny Elastic Alignment (DTW)
- Regulatory Signal Constellations (PWM scoring)
- Phylodynamic Trajectory Explorer (molecular clock, dN/dS)

Each feature includes:
- Extended concepts with mathematical foundations
- Full TypeScript implementation (~150-400 lines)
- TUI visualization ASCII mockups
- Ratings (Pedagogical Value, Novelty, Wow Factor)

Also includes TranscriptionFlowOverlay component and various TUI fixes.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
